name: Peanut Butter and Sour Cream Coffeecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sour cream, powdered sugar, brown sugar, and cinnamon in a bowl. Divide the mixture into two halves. Add peanut butter to one half. Set aside both mixtures.
2. In another bowl, combine sugar, margarine, egg Beaters (or eggs), milk, flour, salt, and baking powder. Blend well using low speed of an electric mixer or beat well with a wooden spoon or whisk.
3. Spread half of the egg batter in a greased and floured 9 x 9-inch pan on the bottom only. Top with the peanut butter mixture, followed by the remaining egg batter. Spread the sour cream mixture over the top, then sprinkle with chopped black walnuts.
4. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 35-40 minutes or until the cake springs back when touched lightly in the center.
Serve while still warm.
